sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (event_name VARCHAR, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO events (event_name, event_time) VALUES ('New Year Celebration', timestamptz '2023-01-01 00:00:00 UTC');
UPDATE events SET event_time = strftime(event_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z') WHERE event_name = 'New Year Celebration';
SELECT event_name, strftime(event_time, '%a, %-d %B %Y - %I:%M:%S %p') AS formatted_time FROM events;
